title: Only Bags
description: Only Bags adds 4 diferente bags which allows you to carry more items like if you have an inventory extra
body:
Only Bags adds 4 diferente bags with a unique style which allows you to carry more items like if you have an inventory extra, the bags goes from Iron till Netherite with more slots every one than the last:

Iron Bag: 15 slots

Gold Bag: 26 slots

Diamond Bag: 43 slots

Netherite Bag: 64 slots

Versions:

2.0.0 Version adds the spanish translation to the mod

1.5.0 Version adds achievments to the mod
